case_title: TRAVIS SEAN PERRINE VS. RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERRINE, TRAVIS SEAN SERVED AUG-13-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE

ORDER REGARDING RUN FPC,LLC DBA BAR NONE'S MOTION FOR A STAY OF ALL PROCEEDINGS IN ACCORDANCE WITH DELAWARE ORDER

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE'S MOTION FOR A STAY OF ALL PROCEEDINGS IN ACCORDANCE WITH DELAWARE ORDER IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN LIGHT OF CHANCERY COURT OF DELAWARE'S REHABILITATION AND INJUNCTION ORDER DATED NOVEMBER 7, 2013. THE COURT GRANTS THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. THERE IS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE PRESENTED TO THE COURT TO CONCLUDE THAT INDEMNITY IS BAR NONE'S INSURER AND IS DEFENDING THIS ACTION. THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL, FILED ON NOVEMBER 18, 2013 AND TO BE HEARD WITH THIS MOTION, HAS A DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY FROM BAR NONE'S COUNSEL STATING THAT SHE WAS RETAINED BY INDEMNITY TO DEFEND THIS ACTION. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS BEEN AWARE SINCE AT LEAST OCTOBER 1, 2013 THAT INDEMNITY WAS DEFENDING THIS ACTION. (SEE DECLARATION OF JESSICA PLINER IN SUPPORT OF REPLY, 5, EX. B.) THE CASE WILL BE STAYED UNTIL MAY 6, 2014 OR FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE RUN FPC, LLC DBA BAR NONE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 473(B), THE DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE. DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED THAT IT MISTAKENLY BELIEVED IT WAS REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL UNTIL JUNE 2014. UPON LEARNING THAT IT WAS NOT REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL, THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES THAT DEFENDANT ACTED DILIGENTLY TO DEFEND THE ACTION - FIRST, BY ATTEMPTING TO SETTLE WITH PLAINTIFF AND THEN, WHEN A SETTLEMENT COULD NOT BE REACHED, HIRING COUNSEL WHO IMMEDIATELY ATTEMPTED TO FILE AN ANSWER. DEFENDANT MAY FILE ITS PROPOSED ANSWER, ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT I TO THE PLINER DECLARATION, WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $600.00 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES INCURRED IN PREPARING THE DEFAULT PAPERWORK WITHIN 30 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: TEANNA L. WARD, CSR #11918 =302/EG

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Off Calendar

Run Fpc, Llc Dba Bar None'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Sep-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE Run FPC, LLC Dba Bar None's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default is Granted. Pursuant to CCP sec. 473(b), the default is set aside. Defendant has established that it mistakenly believed it was represented by counsel until June 2014. Upon learning that it was not represented by counsel, the evidence establishes that Defendant acted diligently to defend the action - first, by attempting to settle with Plaintiff and then, when a settlement could not be reached, hiring counsel who immediately attempted to file an answer. Defendant may file its proposed answer, attached as Exhibit I to the Pliner Declaration, within 10 days of entry of this Order. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff $600.00 in reasonable attorney's fees incurred in preparing the default paperwork within 30 days of entry of this order. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR #11918 =302/eg

Notice Of Motion Andmotion For A Stay Of All Proceedings In Accordance With Delaware Order
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHAEL ROONEY, ESQ., 415.533.0282, FOR PLAINTIFF TRAVIS SEAN PERRINE.
RYAN GILLE, ESQ., 415.278.9400, FOR DEFENDANT RUN FPC. LLC DBA BAR NONE.

RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE'S Motion For A Stay Of All Proceedings In Accordance With Delaware Order is Granted, for good cause shown in light of Chancery Court of Delaware's Rehabilitation and Injunction Order dated November 7, 2013. The Court grants the request for judicial notice. There is sufficient evidence presented to the Court to conclude that Indemnity is Bar None's insurer and is defending this action. The Motion to Withdraw as Counsel, filed on November 18, 2013 and to be heard with this motion, has a declaration under penalty of perjury from Bar None's counsel stating that she was retained by Indemnity to defend this action. Further, plaintiff's counsel has been aware since at least October 1, 2013 that Indemnity was defending this action. (See Declaration of Jessica Pliner in support of Reply, 5, Ex. B.) The case will be stayed until May 6, 2014 or further order of the Court. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RUN FPC, LLC, D/B/A/BAR NONE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Off calendar. Notice of Withdrawal of the Motion submitted on November 12, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
